name: Sound Energy plc
summary: Sound Energy plc, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, appraisal, and development of oil and gas assets. The company holds 47.5% interests in the Greater Tendrara license covering an area of 14,500 square kilometers; Tendrara license, which covers an area of 133.5 square kilometers; and Anoual license covering an area of 8,853.33 square kilometers. It also holds 75% interest in the Sidi Moktar license covering an area of 4,711.7 square kilometers located in Southern Morocco. The company was formerly known as Sound Oil Plc and changed its name to Sound Energy plc in September 2015. Sound Energy plc was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Sevenoaks, the United Kingdom.
